python3 -c "
import csv
with open('market.csv', 'r') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

# Questions resolving Jan 9-15
early = [r for r in rows if r['resolution_date'] >= '2026-01-09' and r['resolution_date'] <= '2026-01-15' and r['is_resolved'] == 'False']
print(f'Questions resolving Jan 9-15: {len(early)}')
for r in early:
    print(f\"  qid {r['qid']}: resolves {r['resolution_date']} - {r['title'][:70]}...\")
"

python3 -c "
import csv
with open('market.csv', 'r') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    if r['qid'] == '459037':
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Resolution: {r[\"resolution_date\"]}')
        print(f'My prediction: {r[\"my_prediction\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:200]}')
"
